replies.author: Awkward_Attitude_719
replies.body: Not Ai it’s a simple python bot … Ai won’t do anything unless u got good logic to enter the trade

replies.author: Drakarit
replies.body: I was thinking of using the python bot with my AI engine,  ehich evaluates news about crypto and jump on it, problem is im in a country that greyed crypto

replies.author: Awkward_Attitude_719
replies.body: How about ur trade size ? When u will enter n exit the trade ? Risk reward ratio.? If a 5 minute candle only hitting 40 pips ur trade must end with in 40 pips…. It’s a market just like regular markets who’re buying n selling happening so all u need to catch is imbalance…!order flow > imbalance > volume n that’s it…

replies.author: karhon107
replies.body: What is the difference between order flow and volume? Is the imbalance between Delta and Volatility?

replies.author: Awkward_Attitude_719
replies.body:
Order flow = live order book 
Volume  = anything big in size our numbers 
Imbalance = difference between buyer n sellers 
Volatility = size of trades our dollars

replies.author: Awkward_Attitude_719
replies.body:
U trading bitcoin 
If imbalance > 3.5 n current volume is > 2x buy
